members.title: Members
members.noPermission: You don’t have permission to manage members for this project.
members.orgBanner: This project belongs to {{org}}. Its owners and admins are admins here; its members are viewers. Those people have access without appearing in the list below.
members.alreadyMember: This user is already a member.
